paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 142 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 68 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 27 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 61 days past due with 48 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 40 days past due with 34 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,658 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 28 days past due with 18 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $44,175 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 11 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **89 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $654,922 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **30 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $25,531 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

253 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **208 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 76 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$686,034 in payments going out this week** across 33 tasks — make sure funds are available. $65,788 expected in from 6 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 11. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 7 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 7 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **30 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 40 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 48 overdue (oldest: 61d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 34 overdue (oldest: 40d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 9. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 18 overdue (oldest: 28d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 11 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **89 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 89 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 6 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
